recipe.title: Fluffy Japanese Soufflé Pancakes

ingredients.name: large eggs
ingredients.note: 50 g each without shell; yolks and whites separated

steps.text: Optional: whip cream with sugar over ice bath to medium-firm peaks; chill until serve.
steps.visualCue: cold cream mounds with curled tips in chilled bowl
steps.runwayRisk: cream separation if bowl too warm

steps.text: Separate egg yolks and whites into two bowls; freeze whites 15 minutes.
steps.visualCue: bright yolks in one bowl, clear whites in another
steps.runwayRisk: yolk contamination in whites prevents whip

steps.text: Whisk yolks with milk and vanilla until pale, thick, and frothy; sift flour and baking powder; mix just until combined.
steps.visualCue: pale ribbon yolk batter with soft flour cloud on sift

steps.text: While whites chill, preheat 11–12 inch nonstick pan to 300°F (150°C) on lowest heat.
steps.visualCue: empty pan warming on low induction
steps.textureCue: steady low heat, no aggressive sizzle yet
steps.runwayRisk: high heat browns exterior before interior sets

steps.text: Beat half-frozen whites to foam, soft peaks, then stiff glossy peaks while adding sugar in thirds.
steps.visualCue: glossy meringue peak standing straight with tip folding slightly
steps.runwayRisk: underbeat collapses; overbeat cracks and folds poorly

steps.text: Fold meringue into yolk batter in stages: one-third whisked in, half folded gently, then final homogenous airy batter.
steps.textureCue: homogeneous pale batter with visible air suspension

steps.text: Brush pan with thin oil film; scoop tall mounds, stack second scoop, form three pancakes; add third scoop when surface looks dry; steam covered 6–7 minutes with water splashes.
steps.visualCue: three tall jiggly mounds under glass lid with steam
steps.textureCue: matte-set skin, moist interior, height from stacking
steps.runwayRisk: batter spreading flat instead of piling; collapse if undercooked

steps.text: Flip each pancake with rolling offset motion; steam second side 4–5 minutes until golden and set.
steps.visualCue: golden underside reveal after gentle roll flip

steps.text: Plate immediately; top with berries and whipped cream; dust confectioners sugar; drizzle maple syrup.
steps.visualCue: three-pancake stack with cream quenelle, berries, sugar snow, syrup ribbon
steps.textureCue: cottony tall stack intact before eating
steps.runwayRisk: stack compresses if moved too soon

assumptions: Licorn kitchen maps the source nonstick frying pan to induction stovetop cooking on @InductionWide with a generic dark nonstick skillet described in prompts (no dedicated pan asset).
Batch size: exactly 3 soufflé pancakes per cook, spaced in an 11–12 inch (28–30 cm) pan as in the source.
Each finished pancake: roughly 7–8 cm diameter at base, 4–6 cm tall jiggly stack (about two cookie-scoop heights plus final mound); not oversized diner flapjacks, not miniature silver-dollar size.
Cookie scoop portions: ~4 cm diameter scoops; at least three scoops per pancake across the cook.
Default hero toppings: halved strawberries, whole blueberries, one medium whipped-cream quenelle, light confectioners sugar dust, thin maple syrup drizzle.
Optional whipped-cream sub-recipe is shown compressed in one garnish beat, not a separate story arc.
Egg-white 15-minute partial freeze is represented as a quick timer insert, not real-time waiting.
criticalTransformations: liquid egg whites to stiff glossy meringue peaks
dense yolk batter lightened by staged meringue folds without deflation
loose airy batter to tall stacked mounds that set under steam
pale steamed domes to golden set pancakes after rolling flip
hot fragile stack to plated hero with stable intact geometry for outro
visualTextureOpportunities: glossy stiff peak pull-up with slightly folded tip
pale frothy yolk ribbon after whisking with milk and vanilla
flour and baking powder sift snowfall into batter
meringue cloud folding into yolk batter with disappearing white streaks
tall triple mound batter jiggle before lid
steam burst when water hits hot pan then lid seals
matte skin drying on mound tops before final scoop
rolling offset flip revealing golden underside
cottony interior spring when gently pressed (no fork tear in final hero segment)
confectioners sugar dust snowfall on golden stack
maple syrup slow ribbon on cream and berries
possibleHooks: open on stiff glossy meringue peak pull-up, scene 2 pays off with fold into airy batter
open on steam lid lift revealing three trembling tall domes
open on flour sift cascade into pale yolk batter then cut to meringue fold
rolling flip golden reveal as mid-video payoff (not opening)
